# Known Limits

- This preview is not an iOS Simulator.
- This preview does not compile Swift.
- This preview does not test the real iPhone camera, microphone, Speech framework, Vision framework, or Guided Access.
- Non-jailbroken iOS does not allow hidden global taps, global screen reading, SpringBoard hooks, lock screen hooks, background wake word, or root daemons.
- Object detection needs a bundled compiled Core ML model before it can be claimed.
- Phone-level actions use Control Mesh: Voice Control, Shortcuts, URL routes, App Intents where available, and user-guided steps.
